'''Burba of Strekk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Swokes Swokes/Legends|Swokes Swokes]] [[flatstender]] who worked on maintaining and guarding [[Tract of Makem Te|the Tract]] of [[Makem Te/Legends|Makem Te]]. Thirty-six [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] every Makem Te day, he would travel the Tract in an old [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]] searching for broken squares, [[schinga]] carcasses, and lost supplicants.

{{Char-stub}}
